trials.v1_measure: Time to the first occurrence of a confirmed composite endpoint
trials.v1_timeframe: Time from randomization to first occurrence (up to approximately 32 months)
trials.current_measure: Number of Participants With First CEC (Clinical Endpoint Committee) Confirmed Primary Composite Endpoint
trials.current_timeframe: From randomization to first occurrence (up to approximately 43 months)

trials.v1_measure: Change from baseline in 6-minute walking distance (6MWD) at Week16
trials.current_measure: Change From Baseline in Kansas-City Cardiomyopathy Questionnaire-Total Symptom Score (KCCQ-TSS) at Week 16 (Higher Scores Represent Less HF Symptom Frequency and Burden)
trials.current_timeframe: At baseline and at week 16 or death before week 16

trials.v1_measure: Kansas City Cardiomyopathy Questionnaire -Total Symptom Score
trials.current_measure: Kansas City Cardiomyopathy Questionnaire -Total Symptom Score
trials.current_timeframe: Baseline - 16 weeks

trials.v1_measure: A Hierarchical Composite of All-Cause Mortality, Heart Failure Events, 6-minute Walk Test Distance (6MWD) and Kansas City Cardiomyopathy Questionnaire (KCCQ) Clinical Summary Score (CSS) Category
trials.v1_timeframe: Randomization (Week 0) to Study Completion (Estimated Up to 120 Weeks)
trials.current_measure: Change From Baseline in the Kansas City Cardiomyopathy Questionnaire (KCCQ) Clinical Summary Score (CSS)
trials.current_timeframe: Baseline, Week 52

trials.v1_measure: Change from baseline in mean daily non-sedentary daytime activity between baseline and end of study
trials.v1_timeframe: Baseline (week -2 to Week 0), last 14 days of treatment (week 10 to week 12)
trials.current_measure: Change From Baseline (Week 0) in the Six Minute Walk Test (6MWT) at End of Study (Week 12)
trials.current_timeframe: Baseline, Week 12

trials.v1_measure: Change in KCCQ (Kansas City Cardiomyopathy Questionnaire ) clinical summary score
trials.v1_timeframe: From baseline (week 0) to end of treatment (week 52)
trials.current_measure: Change in Kansas City Cardiomyopathy Questionnaire Clinical Summary Score (KCCQ-CSS)
trials.current_timeframe: From baseline (week 0) to end of treatment (week 52)

trials.v1_measure: Time to First Occurrence of Composite Endpoint of Cardiovascular (CV) Death or Heart Failure (HF) Hospitalization
trials.v1_timeframe: From date of randomization until the date of first occurrence of a CV death or HF hospitalization, assessed up to approximately 40 months
trials.current_measure: Time to First Occurrence of Composite Endpoint of Cardiovascular (CV) Death or Heart Failure (HF) Hospitalization: Participants With an Event Per 100 Patient-Years
trials.current_timeframe: Up to approximately 36 months (from randomization to the primary completion data cutoff)

trials.v1_measure: Time to first occurrence of CV death or CV hospitalization (or equivalent in outpatient clinic)
trials.current_measure: Changes in Serum K+ Levels From Baseline
trials.current_timeframe: Mean duration of exposure: 227.9 days for Patiromer and 234.5 days for Placebo

trials.v1_measure: Incidence of Death
trials.current_measure: Number of Deaths
trials.current_timeframe: 1 year

trials.v1_measure: Time to the first occurrence of any of the components of the composite: CV death or hospitalization for HF or an urgent HF visit.
trials.v1_timeframe: From randomization visit (day 0) up to approximatley 3 years
trials.current_measure: Subjects Included in the Composite Endpoint of CV Death, Hospitalization Due to Heart Failure or Urgent Visit Due to Heart Failure.
trials.current_timeframe: Up to 27.8 months.

trials.v1_measure: Time to the first occurrence of any of the components of this composite: hospitalization for heart failure (HHF) or cardiovascular (CV) death
trials.v1_timeframe: From randomization visit (Day 0) up to approximately 3 years
trials.current_measure: Analysis of the Hierarchical Primary Composite Endpoint (Full Analysis Set)
trials.current_timeframe: 29 months

trials.v1_measure: The net clinical benefit, hierarchical composite endpoint composed of time to death, number of heart failure events (HFEs), time to first HFE, change in KCCQ-CSS from baseline after 90 days of treatment
trials.v1_timeframe: Baseline and after 90 days of treatment
trials.current_measure: Percentage of Pairwise Comparisons With Wins of Clinical Benefit, a Composite of Death, Number of Heart Failure Events (HFEs), Time to the First HFE and ≥5-point Difference in CfB in KCCQ-TSS After 90 Days of Treatment
trials.current_timeframe: Up to 90 days. For KCCQ-TSS: at baseline and at day 90.

trials.v1_measure: Number of cardiovascular deaths and heart failure events
trials.current_measure: Occurrence of the Composite Endpoint of Cardiovascular Death and Total (First and Recurrent) Heart Failure Events
trials.current_timeframe: From randomization up until the end of study, with an average study duration of 32 months

trials.v1_measure: Composite primary endpoint - Time to first event of adjudicated CV (Cardiovascular) death or adjudicated HHF (Hospitalisation for Heart Failure) in patients with Heart Failure with preserved Ejection Fraction (HFpEF)
trials.current_measure: Time to First Event of Adjudicated Cardiovascular (CV) Death or Adjudicated Hospitalisation for Heart Failure (HHF)
trials.current_timeframe: From randomization until completion of the planned treatment phase, up to 1403 days.

trials.v1_measure: All-cause mortality, as measured by follow-up phone call
trials.current_measure: All-cause Mortality, as Measured by Follow-up Phone Call or NDI
trials.current_timeframe: up to 30 months

trials.v1_measure: Change from baseline in N-terminal pro-brain natriuretic peptide (NT-proBNP) after 12 weeks
trials.current_measure: Change From Baseline in N-terminal Pro-brain Natriuretic Peptide (NT-proBNP) at Week 12
trials.current_timeframe: Baseline, week 12

trials.v1_measure: Composite of time to first heart failure hospitalisation or all-cause mortality
trials.current_measure: Composite of Time to First Heart Failure Hospitalisation or All-cause Mortality
trials.current_timeframe: From randomisation or first study drug administration (if randomisation occurred after first drug administration), until individual day of trial completion. Up to 1004 days.

trials.v1_measure: Measure time to cardiovascular death or first heart failure event
trials.v1_timeframe: Through study completion, up to 208 weeks
trials.current_measure: Time to Cardiovascular Death or First Heart Failure Event
trials.current_timeframe: From randomization to up to earliest of last confirmed survival status date or analysis cut-off date (07 August 2020); the overall median duration of follow-up was 21.8 months up to a maximum of 42 months.

trials.v1_measure: Time to the first occurrence of any of the components of this composite: 1) CV death; 2) Hospitalisation for HF; 3) Urgent HF visit (e.g., emergency department or outpatient visit)
trials.current_measure: Subjects Included in the Composite Endpoint of CV Death, Hospitalization Due to Heart Failure or Urgent Visit Due to Heart Failure.
trials.current_timeframe: Up to 42.1 months

trials.v1_measure: Change from baseline in the CogState Global Cognitive Composite Score (GCCS)
trials.current_measure: Change From Baseline in the CogState Global Cognitive Composite Score (GCCS)
trials.current_timeframe: Baseline, month 36

trials.v1_measure: Time to First Occurrence of Composite Endpoint of Cardiovascular (CV) Death or Heart Failure Hospitalization
trials.current_measure: Time to First Occurrence of Composite Endpoint of Cardiovascular (CV) Death or Heart Failure (HF) Hospitalization
trials.current_timeframe: Up to approximately 33 months (through primary analysis database cutoff date of 18-June-2019)

trials.v1_measure: Composite primary endpoint - Time to first event of adjudicated CV (Cardiovascular) death or adjudicated HHF (Hospitalisation for Heart Failure) in patients with Heart Failure with reduced Ejection Fraction (HFrEF)
trials.current_measure: Time to the First Event of Adjudicated Cardiovascular (CV) Death or Adjudicated Hospitalisation for Heart Failure (HHF)
trials.current_timeframe: From randomisation until completion of the planned treatment period, up to 1040 days.
